creator: bruce@freebsd.zuhause.org
text: OpenJDK tickets JDK-8157272 and JDK-8157411, added to JDK 8u111, add the root certificates used by Let's Encrypt to the cacerts file.  Please add these root CAs to the FreeBSD openjdk 8 package so that certificates signed by Let's Encrypt will be recognized without needed to modify the cacerts file or use a separate cacerts file.
